prompt: A property has a rear extension built in 2021 without planning permission records. What does the CA Protocol say about handling this?
expected_output: CA Protocol section 4.0 guidance on extensions, alterations, planning enforcement periods

assertions.text: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
